"'''The Jabba Tape'''" is a [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] serial that was written by [[John Wagner]], illustrated by [[Kilian Plunkett]], and published in the [[Topps]] magazines [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 13|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 13]] and ''[[Star Wars Galaxy Collector]]'', issues [[Star Wars Galaxy Collector 1|1]]–[[Star Wars Galaxy Collector 3|3]]. The story was later collected in the one-shot comic book ''[[Star Wars: The Jabba Tape]]'', which was published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] in [[1998]].
